summary: Tested new Super-Admin WhatsApp Templates feature end-to-end. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed (GET default shape, PUT 400 on invalid JSON, PUT->GET round-trip with placeholder preserved, _substitute_placeholders nested/unknown/non-string cases, send_absent_message uses custom template with placeholders substituted when configured, falls back to default 'absent_hifg' when cleared - send_wa_template monkeypatched, no real Meta call). Frontend: Logged in as admin/12345678, Templates tab renders 3 cards (absent/fee_paid/event) each with name input, JSON textarea, Load example link and Use default link. Invalid JSON shows 'Invalid JSON' toast and does NOT save. Load example + name 'absent_v2' saves with 'WhatsApp templates saved' toast and persists across reload. Reset clears both fields; saving empty values produces empty strings in GET /api/settings/whatsapp-templates. Test data cleaned up.
critical_code_review_comments: Naming nit: review_request and test_credentials referred to placeholders like '{student_name}' (single braces) but actual implementation, regex in services/whatsapp.py and Settings.js examples all use Meta-standard double braces '{{student_name}}'. UI/backend/tests are internally consistent (double braces) - just clarify to user that double braces are required.

operations.py update_database_settings uses bare globals 'client'/'db' but AsyncIOMotorClient is not imported in this module (line 44, 51). The PUT /api/settings/database endpoint would NameError on use. Not related to current feature but pre-existing bug.

services/whatsapp.py _get_custom_template silently ignores parse errors by returning (None, None). Consider logging at warning (already done) and surfacing via Meta send response so admin notices misconfiguration.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data; cleanup_templates fixture and final frontend reset ensure templates collection is reset to empty strings after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp templates feature is fully working. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_whatsapp_templates.py can be reused for regression. Placeholders use double-brace {{key}} syntax. Settings tab order: School / WhatsApp / Templates / Database, all accessible only to super_admin.
